headerDisplay: Brings your UniFi Protect alarm into Apple HomeKit using a single UniFi OS API key. Generate a key under **Settings → Control Plane → Integrations** in your UniFi OS console.
footerDisplay: Arm profiles named **Away** and **Night** are discovered automatically. If yours use different names, set them below, or pin explicit profile IDs under Advanced.

controller.title: Controller Host / IP
controller.description: Address of your UniFi OS console (UDM, UDM Pro/SE, Cloud Key Gen2+, NVR). No https:// prefix.

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: UniFi OS API key (Settings → Control Plane → Integrations).

awayProfileName.title: Away Profile Name
awayProfileName.description: Arm profile to activate for HomeKit 'Away'.

nightProfileName.title: Night Profile Name
nightProfileName.description: Arm profile to activate for HomeKit 'Night'.

pollInterval.title: Poll Interval (seconds)
pollInterval.description: How often to poll the NVR for state changes.

awayArmProfileId.title: Away Profile ID (advanced)
awayArmProfileId.description: Optional. Bypass name matching with an explicit profile ID.

nightArmProfileId.title: Night Profile ID (advanced)
nightArmProfileId.description: Optional. Bypass name matching with an explicit profile ID.
